Home.heroSubtitle: A powerful self-assessment tool that gives you a bird's-eye view of your life and helps you find balance across the areas that matter most.
Home.whatIsTitle: What is the Wheel of Life?
Home.whatIsBody1: The Wheel of Life is a coaching and self-reflection methodology originally popularised by Paul J. Meyer in the 1960s. It divides your life into 8 key areas — called spheres — and asks you to rate your current level of satisfaction in each one on a scale of 1–10. The result is a visual "wheel" that instantly shows where you feel fulfilled and where there is room to grow.
Home.whatIsBody2: By regularly revisiting your wheel, you develop a habit of honest self-assessment and intentional living. You stop reacting to life and start designing it.
Home.step1Body: Give an honest score from 1 (very unsatisfied) to 10 (fully thriving) for every life area.
Home.step2Body: A lopsided wheel shows where you are neglecting important parts of your life.
Home.step3Body: For each area that needs attention, create concrete, actionable goals.
Home.step4Body: Break goals into daily tasks and check them off to build momentum.
Home.rateSpheresDesc: Give each area of your life an honest score right now. You can also rename any sphere to better reflect your own life.
Home.saveButton: Save your ratings and create a wheel

Todo.title: Wheel of Life
Todo.subtitle: 8 spheres of your life. Rate each area, set goals, and track tasks. Groups are sorted by rating (lower first).

History.title: Completion History
History.subtitle: Daily sum of significance for completed tasks and subtasks.

Changelog.title: Release History
Changelog.subtitle: A running log of notable features and improvements shipped to Wheel of Life.
Changelog.v13Heading: The app is now available in English and Russian
Changelog.v13Body: All pages and components — AppBar, Todo, History, login and register forms, the landing page, and the Changelog itself — are fully translated into Russian. Switch languages instantly with the EN / RU toggle in the top bar; your current page stays open and no reload is needed.
Changelog.v12Body: Every task and subtask now has a significance score (1–10). When you complete a task — or log a recurring one — that score is saved to your history. Head to the History page to see a daily bar chart showing how much meaningful work you got done.
Changelog.v11Heading: Set up your Wheel before you sign up
Changelog.v11Body: The landing page now walks you through rating and renaming your life spheres before you create an account. When you register — with email or Google — your personalised ratings and titles are saved automatically so your dashboard is ready to go from day one.

SphereList.failedToLoad: Failed to load spheres from server.

SpheresRater.sphere1Desc: Professional growth, job satisfaction, and achievement of work goals.
SpheresRater.sphere2Desc: Financial security, savings, investments, and overall monetary well-being.
SpheresRater.sphere3Desc: Physical vitality, exercise habits, nutrition, and energy levels.
SpheresRater.sphere4Desc: Quality of close relationships, intimacy, and social connections.
SpheresRater.sphere5Desc: Learning, skills growth, mindset, and self-improvement.
SpheresRater.sphere6Desc: Hobbies, leisure time, creativity, and activities that bring joy.
SpheresRater.sphere7Desc: Home, workspace, surroundings, and your relationship with your space.
SpheresRater.sphere8Desc: Sense of meaning, values, mindfulness, and connection to something greater.
